title: carpha capitellata
intro: Carpha capitellata, also known as Carpha grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carpha capitellata are attributed to its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Carpha capitellata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
